We must continue to stand with the Jewish community, condemn this cowardly act, and defend every American's right to worship freely and safely.

Congressman LaMalfa was a devoted family man, a proud American, and a champion for the people of Northern California. My prayers are with his family, loved ones, and constituents as they grieve his loss.

I moved to impeach Secretary Mayorkas because he allowed aggravated felons to enter our country & roam freely. I've always said these criminals are exactly who ICE should prioritize for removal. Thank you, @POTUS, for delivering on yet another promise: to make America safe again.
